demo.title: Create Demo with Google

registerDemo.footerSavedNote: Progress saved automatically · Can continue anytime
registerDemo.resetConfirmMessage: All answers you entered will be deleted, and the wizard will return to the first step. This action cannot be undone.
registerDemo.step1Subtitle: 11 quick questions. About 2 minutes. Everything can be changed later.
registerDemo.step1Bullet2: Check your school first — don't duplicate
registerDemo.step1Bullet3: Accounts for admin, teacher, and parent — can try all
registerDemo.step2Subtitle: Select level, then check the name — to avoid duplication with real or other demo schools.
registerDemo.step2ActionUseClaim: Use this data · claim as admin
registerDemo.step2CreateNew: Not this — create "{query}" as your demo
registerDemo.step2NoResults: No results yet. Continue with "Next" button to create new.
registerDemo.step2NpsnExists: This school is already registered in KamilEdu
registerDemo.step2DapodikSuccess: School data filled from Dapodik. Continue to next step.
registerDemo.step2AlreadyExists: This school is already registered in KamilEdu. Use the "Request account" button.
registerDemo.step2RequestSent: Access request sent. You will be notified when it is responded.
registerDemo.step3Title: How many roles do you want to try?
registerDemo.step3Subtitle: Your Google account becomes admin. Can also be teacher & parent at the same time, or use separate accounts.
registerDemo.step4Subtitle1: Initial list automatically based on level
registerDemo.step4Subtitle2: Click to un/select. Can add custom subjects (mulok, skills program, etc).
registerDemo.step4Summary: subjects will be created for this school.
registerDemo.step5Title: How many teachers in your school?
registerDemo.step5PreviewNames: Budi Santoso (Math), Siti Rahmawati (Science), Andi Pratama (Indonesian)
registerDemo.step5ManualInstruction1: Fill in names you know — the rest will be auto-generated randomly.
registerDemo.step5ManualInstruction2: Subjects are chosen from the list at
registerDemo.step5NoSubjects: No subjects selected yet. Go back to Step 4 to select first.
registerDemo.step5TipSuffix: in the Subject column for auto round-robin distribution.
registerDemo.step6Subtitle: Choose common pattern or customize per level.
registerDemo.step7NoteSuffix: will fall back to random. You can upload CSV / edit per student in the dashboard after completion.
registerDemo.step8Subtitle: Parents need an account to see grades, attendance, and bills of their children.
registerDemo.step9Subtitle: System can auto-generate weekly schedule for all classes.
registerDemo.step10Subtitle: Choose types you operate. Can multi-select.
registerDemo.step11BuildingNote: This usually takes a few seconds.
registerDemo.step11NoResultYet: Press "Create demo school" button in Scenarios step to start.
registerDemo.step11Subtitle: Save credentials below — You need them to try 3 roles.
registerDemo.step11AdminNote: Your Google account becomes school ADMIN — full access to all demo data. To experience the actual teacher or parent POV (see teaching schedule / child data), login with the 2 accounts below in a private browser tab. Don't type password manually; use the copy button to avoid mistakes.
registerDemo.step11TeacherPovNote: Login with this account to see teacher perspective — teaching schedule, grades, lesson plans
registerDemo.step11ParentPovNote: parent — child's bills, child's grades, child's attendance
registerDemo.step11FinalNote: Click Enter demo dashboard below to login as admin with your Google account. Don't close the tab — open a new private tab to login with the demo teacher / parent account.
registerDemo.step12Title: Which scenarios do you want to test?
registerDemo.step12Subtitle: Check the scenarios you want us to populate in the demo school. You can disable unnecessary ones to keep data lighter.
registerDemo.step12FinalNote: The selected scenarios will be prepared when your demo is activated. Click Next to fill in the requester details on the next screen.
registerDemo.accuracyNote: Please fill in your data accurately and correctly so your demo request can be processed smoothly.
registerDemo.sampleDataNote: The sample data in this step is only to populate your demo — feel free to fill it with random values to go fast, no need to labour over it. You can re-enter the real data after the demo is active.
registerDemo.identityAccuracyNote: For these personal details, please fill them in to match you as the requester — we use this to validate and to make activating your demo easier.
registerDemo.requesterSubtitle: We use this information to validate and identify you before your demo request is processed.
registerDemo.requesterWhatsappHint: Use an active number — information will be sent here.
registerDemo.requesterFinalNote: After submitting, your request will be reviewed by the KamilEdu team. Further information will be sent via WhatsApp/email.
registerDemo.requesterFormInvalid: Please complete your details correctly before submitting.
registerDemo.requesterErrWhatsapp: Invalid WhatsApp number. Use digits, may start with + (6–32 characters).
registerDemo.requesterErrSocial: At least one social media account is required.
registerDemo.pendingDialogMessage: Your request will be activated after validation & identification are complete.
registerDemo.pendingNoResultYet: Complete the Your details step then click Submit demo request.
registerDemo.pendingTitle: Your demo request has been sent!
registerDemo.pendingSubtitle: The KamilEdu team will review your request. Once validation & identification are complete, your demo will be activated.
registerDemo.pendingNextSteps: Activation information — including how to log in — will be sent to your WhatsApp and email once the request is approved.
registerDemo.pendingFinalNote: You may close this page. We will contact you.

profileMenu.schoolPickerSubtitle: Pick a school to access. You will stay signed in.
profileMenu.noOtherSchools: No other schools are linked to your account.
profileMenu.rolePickerSubtitle: Pick a role for the currently active school.
profileMenu.noOtherRoles: No other roles available for this school.
profileMenu.toastNoSchoolId: School ID not found. Please pick a school again.

inbox.title: Needs Attention
inbox.allClearMsg: Nothing needs attention right now. Great job!

overview.title: Platform overview
overview.subtitle: Monitor tenants, active demos, and the KamilEdu demo-request queue.
overview.demoRequestsCta: Review and activate incoming demo requests.
overview.schoolsCta: Browse all schools / tenants with their demo status.

schools.title: Schools / Tenants
schools.subtitle: All tenants with their demo status and expiry.
schools.coverageNotice: This list currently shows activated demos. Paid and non-demo tenants will appear once a schools-list endpoint is available.
schools.emptyDescription: No demos have been activated yet. Tenants appear here once a demo request is approved.

demoDetail.title: Demo Request Detail
demoDetail.emptyDescription: This demo request could not be found or has been removed.
demoDetail.approveConfirm: Activate this demo? A demo school & account will be created, valid for 7 days, and the requester is notified via email & WhatsApp.
demoDetail.rejectConfirm: Reject this demo request? The requester will not be activated.
demoDetail.approvedToast: Demo activated. Activation notice sent to the requester via email & WhatsApp.

demoAccounts.title: Manage Demo Accounts
demoAccounts.warning: Deleting accounts is permanent and cannot be undone. It applies to demo schools only — real-school accounts can never be deleted.
demoAccounts.empty: No demo accounts available to delete.
demoAccounts.totalAccounts: {count} total accounts on this demo school.
demoAccounts.confirmBody: You are about to delete {action} for this demo school ({count} accounts). This is permanent and cannot be undone.
demoAccounts.deleteSchoolWarning: Permanently deletes this entire demo school — including all accounts, classes, students, subjects, schedules, bills, grades, announcements, and everything else. This cannot be undone. It applies to demo schools only; a real school can never be deleted.
demoAccounts.deleteSchoolConfirmBody: You are about to PERMANENTLY delete the demo school "{name}" and EVERYTHING in it. This cannot be undone.
demoAccounts.deleteSchoolTypeLabel: Type the school name "{name}" or "{word}" to confirm.
demoAccounts.schoolDeletedToast: Demo school "{name}" and all its data have been deleted.

incomplete.title: Incomplete Registrations
incomplete.explainer: People who started registering a demo account but never finished the wizard. See how far each one got so you can follow up.
incomplete.explainerNote: Those who already submitted a demo request appear on the Demo Requests page, not here.
incomplete.emptyDescription: No one has abandoned the demo wizard midway. Nice!

broadcast.title: Fonnte WhatsApp Broadcast
broadcast.subtitle: Send bulk WhatsApp messages to manual recipients or school administrators safely using the Fonnte gateway.

form.manualPlaceholder: Enter WhatsApp numbers separated by commas or new lines (e.g. 6281234567890, 081234567891)
form.messagePlaceholder: Type your message here... Use {name} and {school_name} as placeholders.

progress.noLogs: Ready. Configure the form and click Send to begin...
